reasoning: Luther Burden III is a projected first-round pick in the 2025 NFL Draft, but the probability of him winning Offensive Rookie of the Year is very low. The award typically favors quarterbacks (like expected top picks Shedeur Sanders or Cam Ward) and highly productive running backs or receivers who land in optimal situations. He faces fierce competition from other highly-ranked offensive prospects including Ashton Jeanty, Travis Hunter, and Tetairoa McMillan. Taking into account the low base rate of wide receivers winning the award combined with the strong field of 2025 offensive prospects, the market freeze value of 0.45% accurately reflects his slim chances.
